str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - emotional-intelligence
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Building Resilience in the Face of Tech Challenges
entry.summary: Empower your tech journey with resilience! Explore 15 strategies to face challenges head-on, from cultivating a growth mindset to maintaining well-being. Thrive in the dynamic world of technology!

entry.title: Developing Emotional Intelligence in the Tech World
entry.summary: Navigate the tech world with emotional intelligence! Explore 15 strategies for self-awareness, empathy, and effective communication. Elevate your career and foster a positive workplace culture.
